metadata.description: GSMLG's plugin marketplace: development agents, skills, workflow commands, and framework tools

plugins.name: dev-agents
plugins.description: 8 specialized development agents: architect, debugger, documenter, implementer, refactorer, researcher, reviewer, tester

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow commands: commits, review, suggestions, brainstorming, worktree merging

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub automation: fix GitHub Actions failures and PR issues

plugins.name: chrome-devtools
plugins.description: Browser automation, accessibility debugging, LCP optimization, and DevTools troubleshooting skills

plugins.name: elixir-dev
plugins.description: Elixir/Phoenix architecture, project setup, and release migration skills

plugins.name: duskmoon-ui
plugins.description: Duskmoon design system: CSS components, CSS art, web components, and Phoenix LiveView UI skills

plugins.name: speckit
plugins.description: Specification-Driven Development toolkit with AI-assisted spec workflows

plugins.name: flutter-skills
plugins.description: Flutter development skills: integration tests, widget tests, architecture, responsive layouts, localization, and more

plugins.name: gsmlg-app
plugins.description: GSMLG app development skills: Flutter DuskMoon UI design system with theme, adaptive widgets, settings, and feedback
